title: Adimenssion
description: All dimenssions in one, explore worlds, defeat bosses, improve your skills. Adimenssions is a modpack for simple and fun gameplay. Available in 1.21.1!
body:
All dimenssions in one, explore worlds, defeat bosses, improve your skills. Adimenssions is a modpack for simple and fun gameplay. Available in 1.21.1!

💫Imagine exploring the paradise, here you can! With Aether you can do unbeliavable things!

💫Defeat bosses!

💫Explore the structures and more!!!

🕳️Do you ever think in a Warden Dimenssion? We have this. With Deeper and Darker you can enter the Warden Dimenssion
